ao_bake.engine: Blender BVHTree deterministic cosine-weighted hemisphere ray bake; Step 14 equivalently audited path

mip_filter_policy.source_delivery: lossless mip 0 only; lower mips are derived consumer data
mip_filter_policy.base_color: 2x2 box average in linear-light space then re-encode sRGB; derived interpretation, never exact source RGB
mip_filter_policy.normal: 2x2 vector average followed by renormalization in tangent space
mip_filter_policy.orm: 2x2 scalar average per channel; metallic must remain exactly zero
mip_filter_policy.alpha: opaque 255 at every mip if alpha exists

filter_policy.mip0_exactness_audit: nearest/point sampling at integer texel centers
filter_policy.dcc_preview: trilinear with 8x anisotropy after exactness audit
filter_policy.future_unreal_sampling: trilinear with project anisotropy; exact rendered-pixel equivalence is not claimed
